note: Tidy CSV exports baked from public IEMOP files. Free to reuse under CC-BY-4.0; cite Power Dispatch Studio. Regenerated on every bake.

files.description: Every named 230 kV equipment the operator held at a limit in the window, ranked by days bound. Source: IEMOP RTDCV + DAPCV.
Both validation engines per grid over the market-priced window. The offer premium is the offer_replay modeled mean minus the cost_model modeled mean.
The day-by-day archive feed: observed LWAP, island spread, curtailment, alert advisories, peak reserve price, and the day's binding equipment.
